claim: Claude for Chrome uses Sonnet 4.5 and enables the model to click buttons, fill out forms, and navigate the web directly from your browser.
actionable: Install Claude for Chrome browser extension to access Claude's computer use capability for automating web-based workflows.
source_title: Claude for Chrome brings AI where you're already working

claim: Granular permissions allow users to control what actions Claude can take through Claude for Chrome.
actionable: Review and set granular permissions in Claude for Chrome to control which actions the model can perform on your behalf.
source_title: Claude for Chrome brings AI where you're already working

claim: Claude for Chrome includes protections against prompt injection attacks and restrictions on which websites Claude can interact with.
actionable: Understand that Claude for Chrome has built-in protections against prompt injection and limited website access to maintain security.
source_title: Claude for Chrome brings AI where you're already working

claim: Claude asks permission before taking sensitive actions like making purchases through Claude for Chrome.
actionable: Know that Claude for Chrome will explicitly request confirmation before executing financially sensitive actions.
source_title: Claude for Chrome brings AI where you're already working
